title: LoopStorm Policy Pack
description: Schema for policy YAML files that define enforcement rules, budget caps, and agent identity. The single source of truth for all consumers (ADR-003). CI enforces SHA-256 hash match with engine/build.rs.

schema_version.description: Policy schema version. Engine rejects packs with unsupported versions.

name.description: Human-readable name for this policy pack.

description.description: Description of this policy pack's purpose.

agent_role.description: The agent role this policy pack applies to (ADR-008). Optional in schema_version 1, required in schema_version 2.

environment.description: Default environment tag for this policy pack. Can be overridden per-rule.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. First match wins. If no rule matches, the decision is deny (ADR-002).

budget.description: Budget configuration for runs using this policy pack (ADR-007).

loop_detection.description: Loop detection configuration. Optional — defaults apply if omitted.

redaction.description: Redaction patterns configuration. Optional — defaults apply if omitted.

name.description: Unique name for this rule within the policy pack.

action.description: The enforcement action when this rule matches.

tool.description: Exact tool name to match. Mutually exclusive with tool_pattern.

tool_pattern.description: Glob pattern to match tool names (e.g., 'db.*', 'http.request'). Mutually exclusive with tool.

conditions.description: Additional conditions that must all be true for this rule to match.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for require_approval decisions. If no human response within this time, timeout_action applies.

timeout_action.description: Action when a require_approval decision times out. Defaults to 'deny'.

reason.description: Human-readable reason included in deny/require_approval responses.

priority.description: Optional explicit priority. Lower numbers match first. If omitted, rules are evaluated in array order.

field.description: The field to evaluate. Supports: 'agent_role', 'environment', 'tool', 'url', or dot-notation into args_redacted (e.g., 'args.url').

value.description: The value to compare against. String for equals/matches, array for in/not_in.

pattern.description: Glob or regex pattern for matches/not_matches operators. Alternative to 'value' for pattern-based matching.

budget.description: Multi-dimensional budget configuration (ADR-007). All dimensions are optional.

soft.description: Soft cap — emits warning event but run continues.
Soft cap — emits warning event but run continues.

identical_call_window_seconds.description: Rolling window in seconds for identical call detection (Heuristic 1).

identical_call_threshold.description: Number of identical calls within the window before the heuristic fires.

identical_error_threshold.description: Number of identical error responses without intervening success before the heuristic fires (Heuristic 2).

cooldown_ms.description: Cooldown pause in milliseconds on first loop detection trigger.

additional_patterns.description: Additional regex patterns for secret detection beyond the defaults.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match sensitive values.

key_patterns.description: JSON key names that should always be redacted.
